 {"id":"bd-2glw","title":"Docs: packages.md (install/remove/update/list + resource resolution)","description":"# Goal
Create `docs/packages.md` documenting package sources and CLI subcommands.

# Source Material
- Legacy: `legacy_pi_mono_code/pi-mono/packages/coding-agent/docs/packages.md`
- Rust: `src/package_manager.rs`, `src/cli.rs`

# Must Include
- Supported sources (npm/git/local) as implemented.
- `pi install/remove/update/list/config` usage.
- How package resources (skills/prompts/themes/extensions) are discovered.","acceptance_criteria":"[ ] Scope in description implemented fully with no feature loss
[ ] If behavior changes, add unit tests for success/failure + edge cases; otherwise note N/A explicitly in notes
[ ] Integration/E2E script exercises the end-to-end path (or explicitly marks N/A with rationale in notes) and emits detailed JSONL logs + artifacts per bd-4u9
[ ] Logs include inputs, outputs, timing, and redaction summary; artifacts list is deterministic
[ ] Any new fixtures/golden outputs are deterministic and documented
[ ] Quality gates pass: cargo fmt --check, cargo check --all-targets, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test
[ ] Docs/fixtures updated if behavior or UX changes","status":"closed","priority":4,"issue_type":"chore","created_at":"2026-02-03T19:50:04.105877443Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T19:30:41.901931955Z","closed_at":"2026-02-04T06:14:00.619525711Z","close_reason":"Updated docs/packages.md with filter pattern semantics + empty filter behavior","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2glw","depends_on_id":"bd-3m7f","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T00:00:00Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2gn","title":"Unit tests: ResourceLoader discovery + diagnostics","description":"Goal:
- Add unit/integration tests for ResourceLoader (skills/prompts/themes/extensions) using real files and directories, with detailed logging.

Scope:
- Skill discovery from explicit paths + defaults.
- Prompt template discovery + metadata parsing.
- Theme loading with explicit path + package sources.
- Diagnostics: collisions, invalid files, missing resources, precedence rules.

Logging Requirements:
- Use TestHarness/TestLogger (bd-3ml) in each test.
- Log resolved paths, chosen winners for collisions, and diagnostics payloads.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Tests use real temp dirs and files; no mocks.
- Diagnostics asserted for collisions + invalid metadata.
- Logs include inputs, resolution decisions, and outputs.
- Deterministic ordering and no network usage.","acceptance_criteria":"[ ] Scope in description implemented fully with no feature loss
[ ] Unit tests cover core success/failure + edge cases for this bead (add regression coverage if applicable)
[ ] Integration/E2E script exercises the end-to-end path (or explicitly marks N/A with rationale in notes) and emits detailed JSONL logs + artifacts per bd-4u9
[ ] Logs include inputs, outputs, timing, and redaction summary; artifacts list is deterministic
[ ] Any new fixtures/golden outputs are deterministic and documented
[ ] Quality gates pass: cargo fmt --check, cargo check --all-targets, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test
[ ] Docs/fixtures updated if behavior or UX changes","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-03T04:58:39.658643959Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T19:25:36.774363546Z","closed_at":"2026-02-03T09:18:40.431888685Z","close_reason":"Added ResourceLoader discovery/diagnostics tests; made resource dedupe deterministic","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2gn","depends_on_id":"bd-26s","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T00:00:02Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2gn","depends_on_id":"bd-3ml","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T00:00:02Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2gp2","title":"Track extension proposals + backlog","description":"# Goal
Create a systematic way to capture new extension suggestions between refresh cycles.

# Deliverables
- Intake template for new extension candidates (source, reason, evidence).
- Backlog triage rules and priority labels.
- Clear path to move proposals into the next refresh cycle.

# Notes
Prevents ad‑hoc additions that bypass validation.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-05T07:43:28.184745614Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T06:27:56.435075094Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T06:27:56.209140012Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2gp2","depends_on_id":"bd-1c4v","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T07:44:11.928070694Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2gp2","depends_on_id":"bd-26xo","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-05T07:43:29.549173255Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":362,"issue_id":"bd-2gp2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Background: New extension ideas will appear between formal refresh cycles.

Reasoning: A structured intake prevents ad‑hoc additions that bypass validation.

Considerations: Keep the intake template short but capture evidence (source, popularity, rationale).","created_at":"2026-02-05T07:55:48Z"},{"id":694,"issue_id":"bd-2gp2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Closed. Added extension proposal intake template with triage rules (high/med/low/reject) and process for moving proposals into refresh cycles. Lives in docs/EXTENSION_REFRESH_CHECKLIST.md under 'Extension Proposal Intake' section.","created_at":"2026-02-07T06:27:56Z"}]}
+{"id":"bd-2gxk","title":"Raise traceability policy threshold to 100%","description":"With classified coverage now at 100%, update docs/traceability_matrix.json ci_policy.min_classified_trace_coverage_pct from 20 to 100 and validate governance + staleness tests.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-09T16:08:28.689955924Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-09T16:09:52.708695445Z","closed_at":"2026-02-09T16:09:52.708670519Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-2h67","title":"Unit tests: providers/azure.rs — resource/deployment config","description":"Add/verify unit tests for Azure OpenAI provider: (1) URL construction from resource+deployment+api-version. (2) Auth via api-key header. (3) Request body matches Azure format. (4) Stream parsing handles Azure's SSE format. (5) Error when resource/deployment not configured. No mocks.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:12:24.869070688Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T17:43:32.316778118Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T17:43:32.316749295Z","close_reason":"Added Azure provider resource/deployment config and request-shape unit tests in src/providers/azure.rs","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-2hap","title":"Research extension landscape + taxonomy","description":"# Goal
Establish a comprehensive, evidence‑based map of the Pi extension ecosystem and define a precise taxonomy of extension shapes we must support.

# Scope
- Enumerate extension types (skills, prompts, tools, MCP servers, providers, templates, packages).
- Identify authoritative discovery sources and research methodology.
- Produce a deduplicated candidate pool with metadata for ranking.

# Non‑Goals
No selection or acquisition decisions here; this bead only builds the research foundation.","notes":"Progress 2026-02-05 (3):
- Pulled MCP Registry API sample data via /v0/servers?limit=10 and /v0/servers?search=filesystem; captured server names, packages, transports, repos, and publishedAt dates.
- Current candidate list (subset; see docs constraint on cursor pagination):
  * ai.aliengiraffe/spotdb (oci docker.io/aliengiraffe/spotdb:0.1.0, stdio)
  * ai.alpic.test/test-mcp-server (remote streamable-http https://test.alpic.ai/)
  * ai.autoblocks/contextlayer-mcp (@contextlayer/mcp 0.0.3, stdio)
  * ai.autoblocks/ctxl (ctxl 0.0.2, stdio)
  * ai.autoblocks/ctxl-mcp (ctxl-mcp 0.0.2, stdio)
  * ai.cirra/salesforce-mcp (remote streamable-http https://mcp.cirra.ai/sfdc/mcp)
  * ai.com.mcp/contabo (remote streamable-http https://contabo.run.mcp.com.ai/mcp)
  * ai.com.mcp/hapi-mcp (oci docker.io/hapimcp/hapi-cli:0.6.0, streamable-http)
  * ai.com.mcp/lenny-rachitsky-podcast (remote streamable-http https://lenny-rachitsky.run.mcp.com.ai/mcp)
  * ai.com.mcp/openai-tools (remote streamable-http https://openai-tools.run.mcp.com.ai/mcp)
  * io.github.Digital-Defiance/mcp-filesystem (@ai-capabilities-suite/mcp-filesystem 0.1.9, stdio; latest)
  * io.github.bytedance/mcp-server-filesystem (@agent-infra/mcp-server-filesystem, stdio/sse/streamable-http)
  * io.github.domdomegg/filesystem-mcp (filesystem-mcp 1.2.1, stdio/streamable-http)
  * io.github.j0hanz/filesystem-context (@j0hanz/filesystem-context-mcp 1.0.9, stdio)
  * io.github.rghsoftware/linux-filesystem (mcpb release, stdio)
- Note: full crawl requires cursor pagination on /v0.1/servers; tool URL safety currently blocks cursor URLs. Next step: get user-provided cursor URL or allow direct API URLs to continue pagination.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-02-05T07:19:34.522706447Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T17:28:07.864114242Z","closed_at":"2026-02-05T16:58:45.627107861Z","close_reason":"Documented extension ecosystem taxonomy + discovery pipeline + dedup strategy and canonical artifacts in EXTENSIONS.md","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2hap","depends_on_id":"bd-ofcj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-05T07:19:34.537098071Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":318,"issue_id":"bd-2hap","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Background: We cannot expand conformance coverage without a complete map of extension shapes and discovery sources.

Reasoning: A rigorous taxonomy and candidate pool prevents blind spots and avoids popularity bias.

Considerations: Capture both npm and non-npm ecosystems; record metadata needed for downstream ranking and acquisition.","created_at":"2026-02-05T07:45:10Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2hd0","title":"Tests: /resume /new /tree /fork session UX","description":"# Goal
Add automated coverage for the interactive session UX parity work.

# Scope
- In-app `/resume` selection loads correct session.
- Session picker delete flow.
- `/new` creates a new session without clobbering prior.
- `/tree` navigation + summary entry logic.
- `/fork` creates and switches to new session file.
- Double-escape behavior.

# Testing Strategy
- Prefer TUI state tests (`tests/tui_state.rs`) for key flows.
- Use temp dirs for session storage.
- Mock `trash` and other external commands via injectable command runner.

# Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests cover the major user-facing flows and prevent regressions.","acceptance_criteria":"[ ] Scope in description implemented fully with no feature loss
[ ] Unit tests cover core success/failure + edge cases for this bead (add regression coverage if applicable)
[ ] Integration/E2E script exercises the end-to-end path (or explicitly marks N/A with rationale in notes) and emits detailed JSONL logs + artifacts per bd-4u9
[ ] Logs include inputs, outputs, timing, and redaction summary; artifacts list is deterministic
[ ] Any new fixtures/golden outputs are deterministic and documented
[ ] Quality gates pass: cargo fmt --check, cargo check --all-targets, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test
[ ] Docs/fixtures updated if behavior or UX changes","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-03T19:42:18.781997766Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T19:27:43.433771237Z","closed_at":"2026-02-04T03:56:08.573506646Z","close_reason":"Added TUI session UX tests for resume/fork/delete","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2hd0","depends_on_id":"bd-14cc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T00:00:02Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2hd0","depends_on_id":"bd-1bzn","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T00:00:02Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2hd0","depends_on_id":"bd-2jdz","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T00:00:02Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2hd0","depends_on_id":"bd-2knt","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T00:00:02Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2hd0","depends_on_id":"bd-2yw7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T00:00:02Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2hd0","depends_on_id":"bd-lqec","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T00:00:02Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2hd0","depends_on_id":"bd-x85o","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T00:00:02Z","created_by":"import"}]}
